stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct concerning the priority of instruction "F-CD runway 28 cleared for take-off"?

options.a: It is the same as "F-CD request QDM".
options.b: It is higher than "F-CD line up runway 28".
options.c: It is less than "F-CD taxi to holding point runway 28".
options.d: It is the same as "F-CD leave control zone via Sierra".
